## BundleFilenameContext.entryName property

The name of the entry.

It is `undefined` for lazy bundles, since a lazy bundle name is resolved per async chunk (use the `[name]` placeholder in the returned string instead).

**Signature:**

```typescript
entryName?: string | undefined;
```
